name: C2xGetTokenSubString
title: C2xGetTokenSubString
syntax: long C2xGetTokenSubString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, long length, char buffer[] );
description: This function copies a specified number of characters from a given position inside the token and adds a terminating \0.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. geo_cnh

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. data

parameters.name: byteOffset
parameters.description: Offset from the beginning of the token in byte

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Number of characters to be copied

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the characters are copied This function adds a terminating \0. Thus, the size of the buffer must be at least one byte larger than length.

return: With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.

description: Node System - PreStart in CAPL Browser
Node Callback Function in CAPL Browser

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
